description: SocketLabs provides email delivery and analytics services, including outbound email sending, reporting, suppression management, and event/webhook-related features. Its platform is used to send and monitor email programmatically and through its control panel.
summary: SocketLabs exposes two documented HTTP integration surfaces: a general account/reporting/configuration API on `api.socketlabs.com` and a separate email Injection API on `inject-cx.socketlabs.com`, both using SocketLabs-issued API keys; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
